strategy: Team fight (37,105 health). Hit with Storm (only 29% resist); he resists Ice and Balance 69% and everything else 49%.
His kill condition: if any Krok Ankh hanging effect is on the board when he dies, he heals to full, and Doom and Gloom or Infection cannot stop that heal.
Round 1 and every third round he drops a random Krok Ankh (shield, trap, blade, HoT, DoT, or weakness) on himself or a wizard, and each needs a spell or TC that specifically clears that effect type.
Before the killing blow, clear every Krok Ankh with the right removals (shatter shields, cleanse weakness, triage DoT, and so on).
Time your burst for the round right after you have cleared the Ankhs and before the next set drops on round 3, 6, or 9.
Funnel Storm blades to one hitter and finish clean.
cheatNotes: Round 1 and every third round he drops a random Krok Ankh hanging effect (shield, trap, blade, HoT, DoT, or weakness) on himself or a wizard.
Krok Ankh effects only come off with a spell or TC that specifically clears that type; you cannot burn a shield Ankh off with damage or a weakness Ankh off with self-hits.
If any Krok Ankh is still up when he dies, he heals to full. Clear every Ankh the round before your kill shot.
That revival heal is a max-percentage heal, so Doom and Gloom and Infection cannot reduce it.
